lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sahaje naam dhiaaeeai giaan paragatt hoe |1|
lines.english: Meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, with intuitive ease and poise, spiritual wisdom is revealed. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਮਨ ਮਤ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਦੂਰਿ ਹੈ ਸਦਾ ਵੇਖੁ ਹਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: e man mat jaaneh har door hai sadaa vekh hadoor |
lines.english: O my mind, do not think of the Lord as being far away; behold Him ever close at hand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਤਿਨੑੀ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh aap pachhaaniaa tinaee ik man dhiaaeaa |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs understand their own selves; they meditate single-mindedly on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦ ਸੁਣਦਾ ਸਦ ਵੇਖਦਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sad sunadaa sad vekhadaa sabad rahiaa bharapoor |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He is always listening, and always watching over us; the Word of His Shabad is all-pervading everywhere. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਰਵਹਿ ਪਿਰੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਸਚੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sadaa raveh pir aapanaa sachai naam sukh paaeaa |2|
lines.english: They enjoy their Husband Lord continually; through the True Name, they find peace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏ ਮਨ ਤੇਰਾ ਕੋ ਨਹੀ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: e man teraa ko nahee kar vekh sabad veechaar |
lines.english: O my mind, no one belongs to you; contemplate the Shabad, and see this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਣੀਐ ਸਬਦਿ ਬੁਝੀਐ ਸਚਿ ਰਹੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabad suneeai sabad bujheeai sach rahai liv laae |
lines.english: Listen to the Shabad, and understand the Shabad, and lovingly focus your consciousness on the True One.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਭਜਿ ਪਉ ਪਾਇਹਿ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har saranaaee bhaj pau paaeihi mokh duaar |3|
lines.english: So run to the Lord's Sanctuary, and find the gate of salvation. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਜੁਗ ਮਹਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸੋਭ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: eis jug meh sobhaa naam kee bin naavai sobh na hoe |
lines.english: In this age, the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is glory; without the Name, there is no glory.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰੀਐ ਸਚੈ ਮਹਲਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sabade haumai maareeai sachai mehal sukh paae |4|
lines.english: Through the Shabad, conquer your ego, and in the True Mansion of the Lord's Presence, you shall find peace. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਸੇ ਮੁਏ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jinee naam visaariaa se mue mar jaeh |
lines.english: Those who forget the Naam are already dead, and they continue dying.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਮਾਇਆ ਕੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਚਾਰਿ ਦਿਹਾੜੇ ਜਾਦੀ ਬਿਲਮੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: eih maaeaa kee sobhaa chaar dihaarre jaadee bilam na hoe |5|
lines.english: The glory of this Maya lasts for only a few days; it disappears in an instant. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੇ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eik aape bakhas milaaeian anadin naame laae |
lines.english: Some are forgiven by the Lord; He unites them with Himself, and keeps them attached to the Naam, night and day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸ ਸਾਦੁ ਨ ਆਇਓ ਬਿਸਟਾ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: har ras saad na aaeo bisattaa maeh samaeh |6|
lines.english: They do not enjoy the sublime essence of the Lord's taste; they sink into the manure. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਸਚਿ ਰਹਹਿ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਹਿ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sach kamaaveh sach raheh sache sach samaeh |7|
lines.english: They practice Truth, and abide in Truth; being truthful, they merge into Truth. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਸੁਣੀਐ ਨ ਦੇਖੀਐ ਜਗੁ ਬੋਲਾ ਅੰਨੑਾ ਭਰਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai suneeai na dekheeai jag bolaa anaa bharamaae |
lines.english: Without the Shabad, the world does not hear, and does not see; deaf and blind, it wanders around.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin baanee siau chit laaeaa se jan niramal paravaan |
lines.english: Those persons who link their consciousness with the Word of His Bani, are immaculately pure, and approved by the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਸੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਿਸੈ ਰਜਾਇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: bin naavai dukh paaeisee naam milai tisai rajaae |8|
lines.english: Without the Naam, it obtains only misery; the Naam is received only by His Will. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਸੇ ਦਰਿ ਸਚੇ ਜਾਣੁ ॥੯॥੧੩॥੩੫॥
lines.translit: naanak naam tinaa kade na veesarai se dar sache jaan |9|13|35|
lines.english: O Nanak, they never forget the Naam, and in the Court of the Lord, they are known as true. ||9||13||35||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੌ ਹੀ ਭਗਤ ਜਾਪਦੇ ਜਿਨੑ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਚੀ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabadau hee bhagat jaapade jina kee baanee sachee hoe |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Shabad, the devotees are known; their words are true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਇਆ ਨਾਉ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਸਚਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: vichahu aap geaa naau maniaa sach milaavaa hoe |1|
lines.english: They eradicate ego from within themselves; they surrender to the Naam, the Name of the Lord, and meet with the True One. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲੁ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਕਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਹੈ ਤਿਨੑ ਮਾਨੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: safal tinaa kaa janam hai tina maanai sabh koe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: How blessed is their coming into the world! Everyone adores them. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਨ ਕੀ ਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam jan kee pat hoe |
lines.english: Through the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, His humble servants obtain honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰੈ ਤਾ ਜਾਤਿ ਜਾਇ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਭਗਵਾਨੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sabad marai taa jaat jaae jotee jot milai bhagavaan |2|
lines.english: If one dies in the Word of the Shabad, then he is rid of this, and his light is merged into the Light of the Lord God. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਜਾਤਿ ਹੈ ਅਤਿ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: haumai meraa jaat hai at krodh abhimaan |
lines.english: Ego, self-centeredness, excessive anger and pride are the lot of mankind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਵੈ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਭਰੇ ਅਖੁਟ ਭੰਡਾਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naam navai nidh paaeaa bhare akhutt bhanddaaraa |3|
lines.english: I have obtained the nine treasures of the Naam, and my storehouse is inexhaustible, filled to overflowing. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਸਫਲ ਜਨਮੁ ਹਮਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: pooraa satigur bhettiaa safal janam hamaaraa |
lines.english: Meeting with the Perfect True Guru, my life has been blessed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਹਿ ਇਸੁ ਰਾਸੀ ਕੇ ਵਾਪਾਰੀਏ ਜਿਨੑਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: aaveh is raasee ke vaapaaree jinaa naam piaaraa |
lines.english: Those who love the Naam come as dealers in the merchandise of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋ ਧਨੁ ਪਾਏ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai so dhan paae tinaa antar sabad veechaaraa |4|
lines.english: Those who become Gurmukh obtain this wealth; deep within, they contemplate the Shabad. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਹੁ ਆਪਿ ਖੁਆਇਅਨੁ ਜੂਐ ਬਾਜੀ ਹਾਰੀ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: dhurahu aap khuaaeian jooai baajee haaree |5|
lines.english: The Primal Lord Himself has beguiled them; they lose their lives in the gamble. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤੀ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੑੀ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: bhagatee saar na jaananaee manamukh ahankaaree |
lines.english: The egotistical, self-willed manmukhs do not appreciate the value of devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਗੁਰ ਭਗਤੀ ਮਨ ਧੀਰਿ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: prem padaarath paaeeai gur bhagatee man dheer |6|
lines.english: The wealth of love is obtained from the Guru; through devotion, the mind becomes steady. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਪਿਆਰੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਨਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ਸਰੀਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bin piaarai bhagat na hovee naa sukh hoe sareer |
lines.english: Without loving affection, devotional worship is not possible, and the body cannot be at peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਏਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਮਾਰਿ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: hiradai eko naam vasai haumai dubidhaa maar |7|
lines.english: The One Name abides in his heart, and he conquers his ego and duality. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਾਏ ਸੋ ਕਰੇ ਗੁਰਸਬਦ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jis no bhagat karaae so kare gurasabad veechaar |
lines.english: He alone performs devotional worship, whom the Lord so blesses; he contemplates the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਾ ਕੀ ਜਤਿ ਪਤਿ ਏਕੋੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਸਵਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bhagataa kee jat pat eko naam hai aape le savaar |
lines.english: The One Name is the social status and honor of the devotees; the Lord Himself adorns them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਉ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਸਾਰਿ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: sadaa saranaaee tis kee jiau bhaavai tiau kaaraj saar |8|
lines.english: They remain forever in the Protection of His Sanctuary. As it pleases His Will, He arranges their affairs. ||8||
